title: GMD v1.0.0 - Git Merge Directories Suite
instructions: Create a Python-based directory synchronization and git submodule management suite. Two separate programs (gmd-merge and gmd-commit) with shared config system, multiple output formats (color, plain, json), backup support, progress bars, and interactive mode.

1784083904.3018873.instruction: Create the complete directory structure: gmd/ package with core/, cli/, config/, output/, utils/ subdirectories. Create setup.py, requirements.txt, and .gitignore files. Make gmd-merge and gmd-commit entry point scripts executable.

log.text: Created complete project structure: gmd/ package with core/, cli/, config/, output/, utils/ subdirectories. Created setup.py with dependencies (rich, pydantic, PyYAML, click), requirements.txt, requirements-dev.txt, and .gitignore. Created executable entry point scripts gmd-merge and gmd-commit. All __init__.py files in place for proper package structure.

1784083923.0382187.instruction: Create gmd/config/schema.py with Pydantic models for config validation. Create gmd/config/loader.py to load JSON/YAML configs, auto-detect .gmdrc files, and merge CLI args with config file values. Include example config files in config/ directory.

log.text: Created gmd/config/schema.py with Pydantic models for all config sections (GMDConfig, MergeConfig, CommitConfig, OutputConfig, BackupConfig) including enums for OutputFormat, SyncDirection, SyncMode, Action, Categories with proper validation. Created gmd/config/loader.py with ConfigLoader class supporting JSON/YAML loading, auto-detection of .gmdrc files, and deep merge with CLI args. Created 4 example config files: merge.example.json, merge.example.yaml, commit.example.json, commit.example.yaml.

1784083924.812592.instruction: Create gmd/output/formatter.py as the dispatcher. Create gmd/output/console.py for colored terminal output using rich library, gmd/output/plain.py for text-only output, and gmd/output/json_fmt.py for JSON output. Support format selection via CLI and config.

log.text: Created complete output formatting system: gmd/output/formatter.py as dispatcher that routes to appropriate formatter, gmd/output/console.py with Rich library for colored output including progress bars, tables, and syntax highlighting, gmd/output/plain.py for text-only output suitable for piping/logging, gmd/output/json_fmt.py for machine-readable JSON output with full data collection. All formatters implement consistent interface with header, info/success/warning/error messages, file operations (missing/update/exists/copied/error), statistics, progress tracking, prompts, diff display, and git operations.

1784083926.5380576.instruction: Create gmd/core/scanner.py for recursive directory scanning with exclude pattern support (glob/regex). Create gmd/core/comparator.py for SHA256 file comparison, detecting MISSING/UPDATE/EXISTS categories. Include progress callback support for large directories.

log.text: Created gmd/core/scanner.py with DirectoryScanner class supporting recursive scanning, glob/regex exclude patterns, progress callbacks, and scan_pair for comparing two directories. FileEntry and ScanResult dataclasses for structured data. Created gmd/core/comparator.py with FileComparator class using SHA256 hashing, FileStatus enum for MISSING/UPDATE/EXISTS/EXTRA categories, FileComparison dataclass with source/dest path properties, ComparisonResult with statistics, quick compare (size/mtime) before hashing for performance, hash caching, and diff generation with subprocess fallback.

1784083928.7908726.instruction: Create gmd/core/merger.py for file copy/sync operations with direction support (master→slave, slave→master, bidirectional). Create gmd/core/backup.py for automatic backup before changes, with timestamped directories and configurable retention (keep N backups). Include verification after copy.

log.text: Created gmd/core/merger.py with DirectoryMerger class supporting all sync directions (master-to-slave, slave-to-master, bidirectional), MergeOperation and MergeReport dataclasses, progress callbacks, dry-run mode, and verification after copy. Created gmd/core/backup.py with BackupManager class supporting timestamped backup directories, configurable retention policy (keep N backups), JSON manifest for tracking, specific file backup, full directory backup, and restore functionality. Updated gmd/core/__init__.py exports.

1784083930.5417018.instruction: Create gmd/utils/interactive.py for file-by-file approval with diff preview. Create gmd/utils/progress.py for progress bars using rich library. Create gmd/utils/common.py for shared utility functions. Ensure interactive mode integrates with all output formats.

log.text: Created gmd/utils/interactive.py with InteractiveMode class supporting file-by-file approval, diff preview, batch confirmation, and actions (yes/no/yes-to-all/diff/skip/quit). Created gmd/utils/progress.py with ProgressManager, MultiProgressManager, and ProgressCallback for Rich-based progress bars. Created gmd/utils/common.py with utility functions: format_size, format_time, ensure_dir, safe_copy, verify_copy, is_binary_file, find_files, get_disk_usage, truncate_path, get_terminal_width, pluralize, confirm_overwrite, safe_delete, get_system_info. Updated gmd/utils/__init__.py with all exports.

1784083933.1727693.instruction: Create gmd/cli/merge.py with complete CLI using click or argparse. Implement all actions: preview, sync, diff, backup. Support --master/-M, --slave/-S, --config, --action, --format, --interactive, --backup, --dry-run, --reverse, --excludes, --progress flags. Integrate all core modules.

log.text: Created gmd/cli/merge.py with complete Click-based CLI. Implements all actions: preview (show differences), sync (perform synchronization), diff (show file differences), backup (create backups). Supports all flags: -M/--master, -S/--slave, -c/--config, -a/--action, -f/--format, -i/--interactive, -b/--backup, -n/--dry-run, -r/--reverse, -e/--excludes (multiple), -p/--progress, -y/--yes, --categories. Integrates all core modules: DirectoryScanner, FileComparator, DirectoryMerger, BackupManager. Uses OutputFormatter for all output, InteractiveMode for file-by-file approval, ProgressManager for progress bars. Includes helper functions _action_preview, _action_diff, _action_backup, _action_sync.

1784083934.8414948.instruction: Create gmd/cli/commit.py for git submodule operations. Auto-detect submodules from .gitmodules or accept manual list. Implement operations: status, add, commit, push, full. Support --directory/-M, --message/-m, --config, --format, --dry-run, --push flags. Process only changed submodules, with parallel execution support.

log.text: Created gmd/cli/commit.py with complete Click-based CLI for git submodule operations. Implements GitSubmoduleManager class with auto-detection from .gitmodules file, status checking (clean/modified/error), git add/commit/push operations. Supports all operations: status (check all submodules), add (stage changes), commit (commit with message), push (push to remote), full (add+commit+push). Supports all flags: -M/--directory, -m/--message, -c/--config, -f/--format, -n/--dry-run, --push, -o/--operation, --submodules (multiple), -j/--jobs for parallel execution. Filters to only changed submodules (except status operation). Uses ThreadPoolExecutor for parallel processing with configurable workers. Integrates OutputFormatter for all output.

1784083936.463562.instruction: Create executable entry point scripts gmd-merge and gmd-commit in project root. Create all __init__.py files for package structure. Ensure proper imports and make scripts runnable both as modules (python -m gmd.cli.merge) and direct execution.

log.text: Verified gmd-merge and gmd-commit entry point scripts exist and are executable. Created gmd/__main__.py for python -m gmd support. Updated gmd/cli/__init__.py with exports for merge_main and commit_main. All __init__.py files are in place: gmd/__init__.py, gmd/cli/__init__.py, gmd/config/__init__.py, gmd/core/__init__.py, gmd/output/__init__.py, gmd/utils/__init__.py. Package structure complete with proper imports.

1784083938.8037524.instruction: Create comprehensive README.md with installation instructions, CLI usage examples for both programs, config file documentation, and feature overview. Include example workflows for common use cases.

log.text: Created comprehensive README.md with: project overview describing both tools (gmd-merge and gmd-commit), complete feature lists, installation instructions from source, quick start examples for both tools, configuration file documentation with JSON and YAML examples, CLI reference tables with all options, five detailed workflow examples covering common use cases (sync with submodules, dev-to-prod, submodule pipeline, bidirectional sync, CI/CD automation), output format documentation (color, plain, JSON, silent), troubleshooting section, and license/author information.
